ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "cid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "driver_license" INTEGER /* Driver's license number of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "membership" TEXT /* Membership status of the customer */,
  "address_1" TEXT /* First line of the customer's address */,
  "address_2" TEXT /* Second line of the customer's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer's address */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province of the customer's address */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the customer's address */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "marketing_opt_in" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer has opted-in for marketing communications */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the customer record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cid")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "oid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "cid" TEXT /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the order record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the order record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("oid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_cid FOREIGN KEY ("cid") REFERENCES customers ("cid")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "iid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "cid" TEXT /* ID of the customer involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date the interaction occurred */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., phone call, email, chat) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction */,
  "csrep_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer service representative involved in the interaction */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the interaction record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the interaction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_cid FOREIGN KEY ("cid") REFERENCES customers ("cid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_csrep_id FOREIGN KEY ("csrep_id") REFERENCES customer_service_reps ("csrep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_service_reps" (
  "csrep_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer service representative */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer service representative */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer service representative */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer service representative */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the customer service representative record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the customer service representative record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("csrep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the marketing campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the marketing campaign */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the marketing campaign record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the marketing campaign record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_campaigns" (
  "customer_campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer campaign */,
  "cid" TEXT /* ID of the customer who participated in the campaign */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketing campaign */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response of the customer to the campaign (e.g., opened email, clicked link) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the customer campaign record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the customer campaign record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_campaigns_cid FOREIGN KEY ("cid") REFERENCES customers ("cid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_campaigns_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "pid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the product record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the product record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pid")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "oid" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "pid" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the order item record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the order item record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_pid FOREIGN KEY ("pid") REFERENCES products ("pid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_oid FOREIGN KEY ("oid") REFERENCES orders ("oid")
)
